---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's the user-visible problem you're trying to solve? Avoid jumping to a solution here.

## Proposed approach

Sketch of how you'd build it. UI mockup, API shape, migration outline — whatever applies.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why didn't you pick those?

## Effort estimate

Rough: small (afternoon) / medium (1-2 days) / large (a week+).

## Out-of-scope check

Confirm the idea isn't already on the "explicitly out of scope" list in [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md):

- [ ] Not asking for multi-tenant SaaS support
- [ ] Not asking for ML-based categorization

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] I'd send a PR
- [ ] I'd help review
- [ ] Just an idea — happy for someone else to pick it up
